;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; WorkerThreadProc - Individual worker thread
; RCX = THREAD_CONTEXT pointer
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
WorkerThreadProc PROC FRAME
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 128
    .allocstack 128
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = thread context
    mov r13d, [r12+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.WorkerId]
    
    mov DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.IsRunning], 1
    
WorkerLoop:
    ; Try to get task from local queue
    mov rcx, r12
    call PopLocalTask
    test rax, rax
    jnz ExecuteTask
    
    ; Local queue empty - try to steal
    mov rcx, r12
    call StealTask
    test rax, rax
    jnz ExecuteTask
    
    ; No work available - idle
    inc QWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.IdleTimeNs]
    pause                       ; Spin-wait hint
    jmp WorkerLoop
    
ExecuteTask:
    mov r14, rax                ; R14 = task pointer
    
    ; Update task state
    mov DWORD PTR [r14+OFFSET TASK.State], 1  ; RUNNING
    mov [r14+OFFSET TASK.WorkerThreadId], r13d
    mov [r12+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.CurrentTask], r14
    
    call GetCurrentTimestamp
    mov [r14+OFFSET TASK.StartTime], rax
    
    ; Execute task function
    mov rcx, [r14+OFFSET TASK.Context]
    mov rax, [r14+OFFSET TASK.Function]
    call rax                    ; Call user function
    
    ; Task complete
    call GetCurrentTimestamp
    mov [r14+OFFSET TASK.CompleteTime], rax
    mov DWORD PTR [r14+OFFSET TASK.State], 2  ; COMPLETE
    
    ; Update statistics
    inc QWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.TasksExecuted]
    
    mov rax, [r14+OFFSET TASK.CompleteTime]
    sub rax, [r14+OFFSET TASK.StartTime]
    add [r12+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.TotalExecutionTimeNs], rax
    
    mov QWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.CurrentTask], 0
    
    jmp WorkerLoop
    
WorkerShutdown:
    mov DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.IsRunning], 0
    xor eax, eax
    add rsp, 128
    pop rbx
    pop r12
    pop r13
    pop r14
    pop r15
    ret
WorkerThreadProc ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PopLocalTask - Pop from worker's local queue
; RCX = THREAD_CONTEXT pointer
; Returns RAX = task pointer or NULL
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PopLocalTask PROC
    mov edx, [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueueTail]
    cmp edx, [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueueHead]
    je QueueEmpty               ; Tail == head, empty
    
    ; Get task at tail
    mov rax, [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueue+rdx*8]
    
    ; Increment tail (circular buffer)
    inc edx
    and edx, TS_LOCAL_QUEUE_SIZE-1
    mov [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueueTail], edx
    
    dec DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.LocalQueueCount]
    ret
    
QueueEmpty:
    xor eax, eax
    ret
PopLocalTask ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; StealTask - Steal from another worker's queue
; RCX = THREAD_CONTEXT pointer (this worker)
; Returns RAX = stolen task or NULL
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
StealTask PROC
    push rbx
    push r12
    push r13
    push r14
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = this worker
    mov r13d, [r12+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.WorkerId]
    
    ; Try to steal from neighbors (simple: try next worker)
    mov r14d, r13d
    inc r14d                    ; Start with next worker ID
    
StealLoop:
    cmp r14d, TS_MAX_WORKERS
    jge StealFailed
    
    ; Get other worker context
    mov eax, r14d
    mov ecx, SIZEOF THREAD_CONTEXT
    mul ecx
    
    ; Need scheduler base - this is simplified
    ; Real implementation would traverse scheduler workers array
    
    ; Check if worker has tasks
    ; mov ebx, [other_worker.LocalQueueHead]
    ; cmp ebx, [other_worker.LocalQueueTail]
    ; je NextVictim
    
    ; Attempt atomic steal from head...
    
NextVictim:
    inc r14d
    jmp StealLoop
    
StealFailed:
    xor eax, eax
    pop r14
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
StealTask ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; SubmitTask - Add task to global queue
; RCX = infrastructure, RDX = task pointer
; Returns EAX = success (1) or failure (0)
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SubmitTask PROC EXPORT FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx
    lea r12, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Scheduler]
    
    ; Generate task ID
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.TaskIdLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    mov rax, [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.NextTaskId]
    inc QWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.NextTaskId]
    
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.TaskIdLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    mov [rdx+OFFSET TASK.TaskId], rax
    
    ; Set submit time
    call GetCurrentTimestamp
    mov [rdx+OFFSET TASK.SubmitTime], rax
    
    ; Add to global queue (simplified - real impl uses lock-free MPMC)
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.GlobalQueueLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_AcquireSRWLockExclusive]
    
    ; Check queue full
    mov rax, [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.GlobalQueueTail]
    inc rax
    cmp rax, TS_GLOBAL_QUEUE_SIZE
    jae QueueFull
    
    ; Store task
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.GlobalQueueTail]
    mov [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.GlobalQueue+rcx*8], rdx
    mov [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.GlobalQueueTail], rax
    
    inc QWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.TotalTasksSubmitted]
    
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.GlobalQueueLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    
    mov eax, 1
    jmp SubmitExit
    
QueueFull:
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET TASK_SCHEDULER.GlobalQueueLock]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ReleaseSRWLockExclusive]
    xor eax, eax
    
SubmitExit:
    add rsp, 40
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
SubmitTask ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; CreateWorkerThread - Create and configure worker thread
; RCX = infrastructure, EDX = worker_id, R8 = entry_point, R9 = context
; Returns RAX = thread handle or NULL
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CreateWorkerThread PROC FRAME
    push r15
    .pushreg r15
    push r14
    .pushreg r14
    push r13
    .pushreg r13
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    
    sub rsp, 88
    .allocstack 88
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx                ; R12 = infrastructure
    mov r13d, edx               ; R13 = worker_id
    mov r14, r8                 ; R14 = entry point
    mov r15, r9                 ; R15 = context
    
    ; Create thread suspended so we can configure it
    xor ecx, ecx                ; lpThreadAttributes
    xor edx, edx                ; dwStackSize (default)
    mov r8, r14                 ; lpStartAddress
    mov r9, r15                 ; lpParameter
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+32], CREATE_SUSPENDED  ; dwCreationFlags
    lea rax, [rsp+40]           ; lpThreadId
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+40], rax
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CreateThread]
    
    test rax, rax
    jz CreateFailed
    mov rbx, rax                ; RBX = thread handle
    
    ; Set thread affinity (pin to specific core if possible)
    mov ecx, r13d               ; Worker ID as preferred processor
    cmp ecx, 64
    jae NoAffinity              ; Skip if >64 cores
    
    ; Calculate affinity mask (1 << worker_id)
    mov rdx, 1
    mov ecx, r13d
    shl rdx, cl
    
    mov rcx, rbx
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_SetThreadAffinityMask]
    
NoAffinity:
    ; Set thread priority
    mov rcx, rbx
    mov edx, THREAD_PRIORITY_NORMAL
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_SetThreadPriority]
    
    ; Resume thread
    mov rcx, rbx
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_ResumeThread]
    
    ; Update statistics
    inc QWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.TotalThreadsCreated]
    
    mov rax, rbx                ; Return handle
    jmp CreateExit
    
CreateFailed:
    xor eax, eax
    
CreateExit:
    add rsp, 88
    pop rbx
    pop r12
    pop r13
    pop r14
    pop r15
    ret
CreateWorkerThread ENDP

    jz InitOutOfMemory

    mov DWORD PTR [r15+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Heartbeat.MaxMisses], HB_MAX_MISSES
    
    ; Create heartbeat shutdown event
    xor ecx, ecx

    mov [r15+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.ConflictDetector.ShutdownEvent], rax

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Week1StartBackgroundThreads - Start all monitoring threads
; RCX = infrastructure
; Returns EAX = error code

Week1StartBackgroundThreads PROC EXPORT FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx
    
    ; Validate
    cmp DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Initialized], 1
    jne StartNotInit
    
    ; Start heartbeat monitor thread
    xor ecx, ecx
    xor edx, edx
    lea r8, HeartbeatMonitorThread
    mov r9, r12
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+32], 0
    lea rax, [rsp+24]
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+40], rax
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CreateThread]
    
    test rax, rax
    jz StartFailed
    mov [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Heartbeat.MonitorThread], rax
    
    ; Start conflict detector thread
    xor ecx, ecx
    xor edx, edx
    lea r8, ConflictDetectorThread
    mov r9, r12
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+32], 0
    lea rax, [rsp+24]
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+40], rax
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CreateThread]
    
    test rax, rax
    jz StartFailed
    mov [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.ConflictDetector.DetectorThread], rax
    
    ; Start scheduler coordinator thread
    xor ecx, ecx
    xor edx, edx
    lea r8, SchedulerCoordinatorThread
    mov r9, r12
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+32], 0
    lea rax, [rsp+24]
    mov QWORD PTR [rsp+40], rax
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CreateThread]
    
    test rax, rax
    jz StartFailed
    mov [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Scheduler.CoordinatorThread], rax
    
    ; Start worker threads
    xor ebx, ebx
WorkerStartLoop:
    cmp ebx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Scheduler.TargetWorkers]
    jge WorkersStarted
    
    ; Setup worker context
    mov eax, ebx
    mov ecx, SIZEOF THREAD_CONTEXT
    mul ecx
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Scheduler.Workers]
    add rcx, rax
    
    mov DWORD PTR [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.WorkerId], ebx
    
    ; Create worker thread
    push rcx
    mov r9, rcx                 ; Context = worker context
    mov r8, OFFSET WorkerThreadProc
    mov edx, ebx
    mov rcx, r12
    call CreateWorkerThread

WorkersStarted:

    pop rbx
    ret
Week1StartBackgroundThreads ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Week1Shutdown - Graceful shutdown
; RCX = infrastructure
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Week1Shutdown PROC EXPORT FRAME
    push rbx
    .pushreg rbx
    push r12
    .pushreg r12
    
    sub rsp, 40
    .allocstack 40
    
    .endprolog
    
    mov r12, rcx
    
    ; Check if initialized
    cmp DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Initialized], 1
    jne ShutdownExit
    
    ; Mark shutdown requested
    mov DWORD PTR [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.ShutdownRequested], 1
    
    ; Debug output
    lea rcx, szWeek1Shutdown
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_OutputDebugStringA]
    
    ; Signal all threads to stop
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Heartbeat.ShutdownEvent]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_SetEvent]
    
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.ConflictDetector.ShutdownEvent]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_SetEvent]
    
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Scheduler.ShutdownEvent]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_SetEvent]
    
    ; Wait for threads with timeout (5 seconds)
    mov ecx, 5000
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_Sleep]
    
    ; Close thread handles
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Heartbeat.MonitorThread]
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @F
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
@@: mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.ConflictDetector.DetectorThread]
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @F
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
@@: mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Scheduler.CoordinatorThread]
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @F
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    ; Close worker threads
    xor ebx, ebx
CloseWorkerLoop:
    cmp ebx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Scheduler.WorkerCount]
    jge WorkersClosed
    
    mov eax, ebx
    mov ecx, SIZEOF THREAD_CONTEXT
    mul ecx
    lea rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Scheduler.Workers]
    add rcx, rax
    
    mov rcx, [rcx+OFFSET THREAD_CONTEXT.ThreadHandle]
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @F
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
@@: inc ebx
    jmp CloseWorkerLoop
    
WorkersClosed:
    ; Close events
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Heartbeat.ShutdownEvent]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.ConflictDetector.ShutdownEvent]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    mov rcx, [r12+OFFSET WEEK1_INFRASTRUCTURE.Scheduler.ShutdownEvent]
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    ; Free memory
    mov rcx, r12
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, MEM_RELEASE
    call QWORD PTR [__imp_VirtualFree]
    
    mov g_Week1Instance, 0
    
ShutdownExit:
    xor eax, eax
    add rsp, 40
    pop r12
    pop rbx
    ret
Week1Shutdown ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; memset - Simple byte fill
; RCX = dest, RDX = count, R8 = value
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
memset PROC
    mov rax, rcx
    mov r9, rdx
    movzx edx, r8b
    
@@: test r9, r9
    jz @F
    mov BYTE PTR [rax], dl
    inc rax
    dec r9
    jmp @B
    
@@: mov rax, rcx
    ret
memset ENDP

#Requires -Version 5.1

<#

[CmdletBinding()]
param(

    [string]$Configuration = "Release",

)

# Error action preference
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

# Colors for output
$ColorSuccess = "Green"
$ColorError = "Red"
$ColorWarning = "Yellow"
$ColorInfo = "Cyan"

function Write-Status {
    param([string]$Message, [string]$Color = $ColorInfo)
    Write-Host "[$(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')] $Message" -ForegroundColor $Color
}

function Test-Command {
    param([string]$Command)
    $null = Get-Command $Command -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    return $?
}

#==============================================================================
# VALIDATION
#==============================================================================

Write-Status "RawrXD Week 1 Build System v1.0" $ColorInfo
Write-Status "Configuration: $Configuration" $ColorInfo
Write-Status ""

# Check for ML64
$ML64Paths = @(
    "${env:ProgramFiles}\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\VC\Tools\MSVC\14.40.33807\bin\Hostx64\x64\ml64.exe",
    "${env:ProgramFiles}\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Professional\VC\Tools\MSVC\14.40.33807\bin\Hostx64\x64\ml64.exe",
    "${env:ProgramFiles}\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Enterprise\VC\Tools\MSVC\14.40.33807\bin\Hostx64\x64\ml64.exe",
    "${env:ProgramFiles(x86)}\Microsoft Visual Studio\2019\Community\VC\Tools\MSVC\14.29.30133\bin\Hostx64\x64\ml64.exe"
)

$ML64 = $null
foreach ($Path in $ML64Paths) {
    if (Test-Path $Path) {
        $ML64 = $Path
        break
    }
}

if (-not $ML64) {
    # Try to find via vswhere
    $VsWhere = "${env:ProgramFiles(x86)}\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe"
    if (Test-Path $VsWhere) {
        $VsPath = & $VsWhere -latest -products * -requires Microsoft.VisualStudio.Component.VC.Tools.x86.x64 -property installationPath
        if ($VsPath) {
            $ML64 = Join-Path $VsPath "VC\Tools\MSVC\*\bin\Hostx64\x64\ml64.exe" | Resolve-Path | Select-Object -First 1
        }
    }
}

if (-not $ML64 -or -not (Test-Path $ML64)) {
    Write-Status "ERROR: ML64.exe not found. Install Visual Studio with C++ workload." $ColorError
    exit 1
}

Write-Status "Found ML64: $ML64" $ColorSuccess

# Check for LINK
$LINK = Join-Path (Split-Path $ML64) "link.exe"
if (-not (Test-Path $LINK)) {
    Write-Status "ERROR: link.exe not found alongside ml64.exe" $ColorError
    exit 1
}

#==============================================================================
# SETUP DIRECTORIES
#==============================================================================

if ($Clean -and (Test-Path $ObjDir)) {
    Write-Status "Cleaning object directory..." $ColorWarning
    Remove-Item -Path $ObjDir -Recurse -Force
}

if ($Clean -and (Test-Path $OutputDir)) {
    Write-Status "Cleaning output directory..." $ColorWarning
    Remove-Item -Path $OutputDir -Recurse -Force
}

if (-not (Test-Path $ObjDir)) {
    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $ObjDir -Force | Out-Null
}

if (-not (Test-Path $OutputDir)) {
    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $OutputDir -Force | Out-Null
}

#==============================================================================
# COMPILATION
#==============================================================================

Write-Status ""
Write-Status "=== COMPILATION PHASE ===" $ColorInfo

$SourceFile = Join-Path $SourceDir "WEEK1_DELIVERABLE.asm"
$ObjectFile = Join-Path $ObjDir "WEEK1_DELIVERABLE.obj"
$DllFile = Join-Path $OutputDir "Week1_BackgroundThreads.dll"
$LibFile = Join-Path $OutputDir "Week1_BackgroundThreads.lib"

if (-not (Test-Path $SourceFile)) {
    Write-Status "ERROR: Source file not found: $SourceFile" $ColorError
    exit 1
}

# Determine flags based on configuration
if ($Configuration -eq "Debug") {
    $AsmFlags = "/c /Fo`"$ObjectFile`" /Zi /Od /W3 /nologo /Ta `"$SourceFile`""
    $LinkFlags = "/DLL /DEBUG /OUT:`"$DllFile`" /IMPLIB:`"$LibFile`""
} else {
    $AsmFlags = "/c /Fo`"$ObjectFile`" /O2 /Zi /W3 /nologo /Ta `"$SourceFile`""
    $LinkFlags = "/DLL /RELEASE /OUT:`"$DllFile`" /IMPLIB:`"$LibFile`""
}

# Compile assembly
Write-Status "[1/3] Assembling WEEK1_DELIVERABLE.asm..." $ColorInfo
Write-Status "      Flags: $AsmFlags" $ColorInfo

$ProcInfo = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo

$ProcInfo.Arguments = $AsmFlags
$ProcInfo.RedirectStandardOutput = $true
$ProcInfo.RedirectStandardError = $true
$ProcInfo.UseShellExecute = $false
$ProcInfo.WorkingDirectory = $PWD

$Process = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process
$Process.StartInfo = $ProcInfo
$Process.Start() | Out-Null

$Stdout = $Process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()
$Stderr = $Process.StandardError.ReadToEnd()
$Process.WaitForExit()

if ($Process.ExitCode -ne 0) {

Write-Status "      Flags: $LinkFlags" $ColorInfo

$ProcInfo.FileName = $LINK
$ProcInfo.Arguments = "$LinkFlags `"$ObjectFile`" kernel32.lib ntdll.lib"
$Process = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process
$Process.StartInfo = $ProcInfo
$Process.Start() | Out-Null

$Stdout = $Process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()
$Stderr = $Process.StandardError.ReadToEnd()
$Process.WaitForExit()

if ($Process.ExitCode -ne 0) {
    Write-Status "ERROR: Link failed with code $($Process.ExitCode)" $ColorError
    Write-Status "STDOUT: $Stdout" $ColorError
    Write-Status "STDERR: $Stderr" $ColorError
    exit 1
}

if ($Stdout) {
    Write-Status "      $Stdout" $ColorWarning
}

#==============================================================================

#==============================================================================

Write-Status ""
Write-Status "=== VERIFICATION PHASE ===" $ColorInfo

$FilesToCheck = @($DllFile, $LibFile)
foreach ($File in $FilesToCheck) {
    if (-not (Test-Path $File)) {

        exit 1
    }

}
